  • Uses of Response in com.client.network

    Methods in com.client.network that return Response
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Response
    AsyncClient.send(Request request)
    Sends a request to the server and waits for response.
    Response
    AsyncClient.sendWithRetry(Request request)
    Attempts to send a request with automatic reconnection on failure.

    Methods in com.common that return Response
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Response
    Response.error(String error)
    Factory method to create an error response.
    static Response
    Response.health(ServerStats stats)
    Factory method to create a health check response.
    static Response
    Response.success(String result)
    Factory method to create a successful response.
    static Response
    Response.withData(Serializable data)
    Factory method to create a response with data object.

  • Uses of Response in com.server.network

    Methods in com.server.network that return Response
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Response
    RequestHandler.handle(Request request)
    Processes an incoming request without client info (for backward compatibility).
    Response
    RequestHandler.handle(Request request, String clientInfo)
    Processes an incoming request and generates a response.

  • Uses of Response in com.utils

    Methods in com.utils that return Response
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Response
    CommandRegistry.execute(String commandName, Map<String,Object> args)
    Executes a command by name with arguments from a Map.
    Response
    CommandRegistry.executeWithData(String commandName, Map<String,Object> args, Object data)
    Executes a command with a data object (for add, add_if_min, update).
